name: Multi-Platform Social Media Automation (LinkedIn, FB, X, Insta)

parameters.prompt:
=You are an expert Editorial AI Image Prompt Engineer.

Your task is to create ONE high-quality image generation prompt for an AI image model based on the provided news article.

News Information

Title:
{{ $json.title || "" }}

Description:
{{ $json.description || "" }}

Social Caption:
{{ $json.caption || "" }}

Instructions

Analyze the news and determine:
- Main subject
- Industry
- Key event
- Mood
- Environment
- Important visual elements

Create a single visually compelling editorial scene that represents the news.

The image should be:

• Editorial style
• Modern corporate branding
• Premium quality
• Highly realistic
• Cinematic lighting
• Dynamic composition
• Professional color grading
• Rich depth
• Suitable for LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram and X
• 16:9 landscape
• Clean background
• High visual impact

Automatically include industry-specific elements when appropriate:

AI:
futuristic interfaces, neural networks, robotics, holographic data, digital intelligence

Technology:
cloud computing, servers, cybersecurity, software engineering, innovation

Finance:
financial markets, investment growth, analytics dashboards, business success

Healthcare:
medical research, hospitals, laboratories, biotechnology

Energy:
renewable energy, sustainability, solar, wind, smart grids

Retail:
shopping experience, logistics, commerce

Manufacturing:
industrial automation, robotics, smart factories

Automotive:
modern vehicles, electric mobility, manufacturing

Strictly avoid:

- Any text
- Logos
- Company names
- Numbers
- Watermarks
- UI screenshots
- Social media icons
- Cartoon style
- Blurry images
- Low quality

Return ONLY the final image prompt.

Do not explain anything.

Do not use markdown.

The prompt must end with:

Professional editorial illustration, ultra realistic, cinematic lighting, premium quality, highly detailed, realistic digital art, clean composition, vibrant professional colors, depth of field, 16:9 landscape, no text, no logo, no watermark.

values.content:
=You are an expert News Analyst and Content Curator for a LinkedIn audience interested in AI, technology, startups, and business.

Analyze the provided array of news articles and select the TOP 5 most important, relevant, and engaging news stories for a professional LinkedIn audience.

Selection Criteria (highest priority first):
1. AI, technology, startup, or business significance
2. Virality and engagement potential on LinkedIn
3. Credibility of the source
4. Uniqueness of the news (avoid duplicates/near-duplicates)
5. Completeness of the article information

Ignore: politics, entertainment, sports, crime, celebrity news, promotional/sponsored content, low-quality or incomplete articles.

Articles:
{{ $json.Title }}
{{ $json.Content }}
{{ $json.Description }}

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON array of exactly 5 objects in this exact format (no markdown, no extra text):
[
  { "rank": 1, "title": "", "url": "", "source": "", "description": "", "score": 95, "reason": "" },
  { "rank": 2, "title": "", "url": "", "source": "", "description": "", "score": 90, "reason": "" }
]

Rules:
- rank 1 = best article, rank 5 = weakest of the selected five.
- Score must be between 1 and 100.
- Do not modify the title, URL, source, or description from the original data.
- Return only valid JSON, no markdown code fences.

parameters.prompt:
=
={{
`Create a premium editorial-quality social media post image based on the following news.

News Context:
${$json.imagePrompt}

Design Requirements:
- Create a modern, professional LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter/X style post.
- The design should look like it was created by a professional marketing agency.
- Use realistic, high-quality visuals that accurately represent the news.
- Include a clean, premium layout with a strong visual hierarchy.
- Add one short, bold headline (3–8 words) related to the news, positioned naturally within the design.
- The headline should be large, modern, and highly readable.
- Use elegant typography with high contrast.
- Add subtle graphic elements such as gradients, abstract shapes, glowing effects, or geometric accents to enhance the composition.
- Include realistic backgrounds and objects that match the news topic.
- Use cinematic lighting, vibrant colors, and professional composition.
- Maintain a clean corporate aesthetic suitable for business audiences.
- Landscape aspect ratio (16:9).
- Ultra HD, 4K quality.
- Highly detailed, photorealistic, editorial style.

Content Rules:
- The image must visually explain the news.
- Automatically determine the correct industry (Technology, AI, Healthcare, Finance, Business, Automotive, Energy, Cybersecurity, Manufacturing, Space, etc.).
- If the news is about a company, represent its industry and products without using the company's official logo.
- If the news is about AI or technology, include futuristic interfaces, data visualization, cloud computing, servers, neural networks, or digital innovation.
- If the news is about finance or business, include stock market visuals, corporate offices, executives, investment themes, or financial growth.

Avoid:
- No watermarks.
- No logos.
- No social media icons.
- No fake website screenshots.
- No excessive text.
- No blurry elements.
- No cartoon style.
- No low-quality graphics.
- No copyright-protected branding.

Generate a visually stunning, viral-quality social media graphic suitable for LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter/X.`
}}
